Off Calendar Apr-08-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff's Motion For Assignment of Rights, Restraining Order, and Turnover Order is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-15-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-15-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly from Dept. 206 for a prove-up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks S. Ravinantapricha/R. Edwards, and CSR: Tony Vauhn.
Appearances: Phil Kildroff, Esq. For Plaintiff.
Defendant not present.
Plaintiff witness: Stan Miller, was sworn and examined.
EXH. 1 - Billing ---------ID/EVID

The Court hears evidence and grants judgment in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Principal amount of $5,224.75 Interest $1,023.58; Costs $181.80; Attorney Fees $560.00, for the total of $6,990.13
Counsel stipulated for return of the exhibit.
Judgment pending.

*** Proposed Judgment received in in Dept 218 on 12-2-04, wrong amount.
*** 2nd Proposed Judgment received in Dept 218 on 01-4-04, wrong amount.

Proposed Judgment rec'd Jan. 25, 2005, Granted and singed by Comm. Kaplan.
